entry.title: Re: Exposed Data access in Power BI and Other Clients, To...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

This KBA might provide some details 

3416339 - Consuming Analytic Models via ODBC https://me.sap.com/notes/3416339/E

I wish, we would be able to model object in single type of view and expose it to SAC / 3rd party applications via ODBS & ODATA. Currently, analytic model restricts us to use it only in SAC, and some of the capabilities present in Analytic view is not available in graphical view.

Regards,

Venky

entry.title: Can we change Recognition Key from SPTM to SPTMWP?
entry.content:
Hello Team! 

We would like to know if we can change our Recognition Key in projects from SPTM to method SPTMWP.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Can we change Recognition Key from SPTM to SPTMWP?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,


Yes, this change is possible! You should just be aware that after the RA key change, the system calculates summarized amounts which do not include separate posting lines for write off or cap adjustments already posted before the change. This means that, for example, detailed information about cap postings per individual employee is no longer available.


Kindly refer to below SAP Help Portal Documentation:

Revenue Recognition Methods for Customer Projects


Best Regards,
SAP Product Support

entry.title: Re: Facing issues to populate Z Quantity Field value in r...
entry.content: Did you find a solution?

entry.title: Re: SAP 7.70 GUI Download
entry.content: Can you please provide a link to download SAP GUI for Mac with M2 processor?

entry.title: Import file in SAC trial version is not working: "Protected storage is empty" message
entry.content:
Recently I created a new trial version of SAC. Started developing few models, however when I am trying to import a CSV/ EXCEL file for Dataset/ Model from local system. I am getting the following message and not able to import.

"Protected storage is Empty". 

No option to select file given. 

Can you please help if this is the expected behavior?.

entry.title: Tell us about your Crystal Reports support environment and plans
entry.content:
Hi
Currently, I'm running a report developed with the following environment
However, for window11 development, I need to increase the dotnet version to dotnet5~9.
Currently, the report is heavily developed, so I have to use reporttool.
In conclusion, can you tell me when dotnet 5~9 will be supported or give me a link if I didn't find it?
I really need your help, thank you.

Current development environment
crystal report : sp32 version
OS : window10 , window11
ide : VS2022
dotnet4.8

entry.title: manual financial adjustments
entry.content:
We are implementing S4HANA Public Cloud 2402 and need support addressing a specific requirement. Client Background and the specific Requirement for which the support is sought are given below:

 

 

 

Client Background

 

The client has is an industry leader in:

Packaging and distribution of Custom specialty Gas mixtures.

Trading in externally procured gases.

In scope LOB include Finance, Sales, Procurement and Supply Chain. Manufacturing is NOT in scope.

The Manufacturing process for Custom specialty Gas mixtures is to issue Pure Gases and Rare Gases to production , perform goods receipt to Inventory and outbound delivery to customers.

 

 

What is the Requirement?

 

The requirement is to be able to split the postings made to the “Offsetting entry for inventory posting” for the Trading business from the Sale of Manufactured Gases.

Refer SAP Customer Influence Request where SAP has recommended that manual financial adjustments to be done at the end of every month.

 

 

Support Requested

 

How can we segregate the postings made for the Trading business from the Sale of Manufactured Gases so that manual financial adjustments can be done?

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports 2020 not retrieving databases ... dri...
entry.content: As mentioned for SQL Server the Wire Protocol can be installed with CR but you need to do a Custom Install and ensure that the Wire Protocol option is selected. The other SQL Server drivers you need to get yourself. Afterwards, you can see which ODBC drivers (including Wire Protocols) were installed with Crystal by going to the 64 bit ODBC Data Source Administrator and look at the Drivers tab...they are prefixed by "CR".

entry.title: MDK calendar view is not working in web
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

I am trying to build a calendar view in for iphone and web view. But it is not working in web view. I dont have any fancy code, just a simple calendar control but it is displaying empty page in web.

{
"Controls": [
{
"FilterFeedbackBar": {
"ShowAllFilters": false,
"_Type": "Control.Type.FilterFeedbackBar"
},
"_Type": "Control.Type.SectionedTable",
"_Name": "SectionedTable0",
"Sections": [
{
"Separators": {
"TopSectionSeparator": false,
"BottomSectionSeparator": true,
"HeaderSeparator": true,
"FooterSeparator": true,
"ControlSeparator": true
},
"_Type": "Section.Type.Calendar",
"_Name": "SectionCalendar0",
"Visible": true,
"CalendarType": "Month",
"StartDayOfWeek": "Sun",
"StartDate": "2024-02-25",
"IsPersistentSelection": true,
"SelectedDate": "2024-03-12"
}
]
}
],
"_Type": "Page",
"_Name": "TestCalendar",
"Caption": "TestCalendar",
"PrefersLargeCaption": true
}

@Jitendra_Kansal  @bill_froelich any help would be great. 

Thanks,

Ram

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hello Everyone!

 

I'm excited in joining this group and community.  I am interested in the digital skills initiative for veterans.  Just want to express my interest and see how I go about the process.  Thank you!

entry.title: Re: SAP Focused RUNの初期実装について情報提供
entry.content: Answer to question 1: Stack.xml file is just for preparing media for installation. Software Provisioning Manager(SWPM) tool should be used to start installation. Download installation guide: Software-Logistics-Tools page Install a System using Software Provisioning Manager Installation Option of Software Provisioning Manager 2.0 SP 13 Installation Guides - Application Server Systems Download the installation guide for your OS type Then refer to guide section 3.2 Installation Using a Stack XML File Answer to question 2 and 3: Please follow guide section 3.2 Installation Using a Stack XML File to provide stack.xml file to SWPM tool. SAP Focused Run 4.0 installation media will be automatically read into SWPM, then it will trigger SPAM/SAINT and SUM tool automatically to finish all installation and upgrade in one run. For more details, please refer to Master Guide and Installation Guide.

entry.title: Attendance Quota Not getting processed on TO20
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts

I tried to configure a new attendance quotas from a different personnel subarea and employee group. I already grouped the PSG and ESG for time quota and time recording, however this employee overtime isn't getting processed on PCR TO20 like the other employee (They both got evaluated by the same schema). Below is the Comparison of both employee's time evaluation. 

Image 1 Overtime didn't get processed

 Image 2 Overtime Processed

 I already got V_T510S WSR configured. Is there anything i missed?, any input would be appreciated.

Thank you,

Kelvin

entry.title: Re: Wage type for overtime worked not appearing on payrol...
entry.content: Apparently i have been running time evaluation with the test run ticked on. Unticking the box solved the problem

entry.title: Re: Unable to see catalogs in SmartEdit for admingroup users
entry.content:
Hey there!

This is due to missing permissions for the Content Catalog, more specific, the read and write ones. Following below Knowledge Article it explains more and also the steps on how to resolve this behavior:

3077070 - SmartEdit – Catalog or Site list is empty 

Hope this answers your doubt.

Kind Regards,
Wesley 
SAP Commerce Cloud Product Support - Brasil

entry.title: Re: How to bypass B2B EarlyLogin in SmartEdit using Spart...
entry.content:
Hey there!

It's actually an expected behavior for B2B Storefront to require authentication in order to access them, but this feature can be disabled by following these steps:

  1. Access Backoffice
  2. WCMS > Website
  3. Select the desired website/storefront
  4. Go to Administration tab
  5. Look for the "Requires authentication" radio button and select "false"
  6. Save

In addition to that, below Knowledge Article might be related to your scenario in case you are using Google Chrome browser:

  • 3421280 - Preview Storefront does not reuse the Local Storage values in Smartedit - SAP Commerce Cloud 

Hopefully this helps with your doubt!

Kind Regards,
Wesley
SAP Commerce Cloud Product Support - Brasil

entry.title: Re: How to import ootb smartedit angular component into c...
entry.content:
Hey there!

Below trail on the subject can be useful in the scenario you are trying to achieve, kindly check:

  • Trail: Upgrading Your Customized SmartEdit Modules from AngularJS to Angular 

Hopefully this helps with your doubt!

Kind Regards,
Wesley
SAP Commerce Cloud Product Support - Brasil

entry.title: Re: Hybris 1811 edit tool bar missing in smartedit
entry.content:
Hello! 

The missing of perspective toolbar in SmartEdit is usually related to the webApplicationInjector.js not being correctly configured or missing parameters. With that in mind, I recommend you checking below Knowledge Article where we explain the best practices and how to troubleshoot webApplicationInjector related errors:

3229569 - webApplicationInjector missing or misconfigured in SmartEdit - SAP Commerce Cloud

Kind Regards,
Wesley
SAP Commerce Cloud Product Support - Brasil

entry.title: Re: Hybris 1811 edit tool bar missing in smartedit
entry.content:
Hello! 

The infinite loading when previewing a Storefront in SmartEdit is usually related to missing obligatory CORS configuration. Therefore, kindly check if all required settings are in place as per:

Setting Up Support for Cross Origin Domains 

Kind Regards,
Wesley
SAP Commerce Cloud Product Support - Brasil

entry.title: SAP Organization
entry.content: Today I organized a document myself regarding the functions and division of responsibilities of various organizations within SAP, deepening my understanding of the entire SAP system. I now have a clearer understanding of SAP's MM module and SD module.

Hey there!

We have an official trail on how override and customize the CKEditor configuration. Kindly check it:

Wesley

entry.title: Re: Define various Toolbar (CKEditor) for CMS-Components...

  • Trail: Adding a Toolbar 

Hopefully this helps with your doubt!

Kind Regards,
Wesley
SAP Commerce Cloud Product Support - Brasil

entry.title: Re: Error while deploying .mtar file/mta_archives from BAS
entry.content: I faced similar error yesterday. It appeared to be an issue when using the context menu in BAS to deploy. I could use the terminal and deploy the mta with command `cf deploy mta_archives/<file>`

entry.title: Re: FICO Certification
entry.content: Appears to be defunct.

entry.title: REST API Communication
entry.content:
Hello colleagues,
Is it possible to have communication between different BO's in same SAP box(on premise) using rest APIs?
For example in my SAP box,I have two RAP BOs B1 and B2 having own service bindings.
In case a document getting created in B1 ,I want to communicate that to B2 .
I can raise an event in B1 but where will I register this event and subscription to B2?
Request your suggestions / feedback on this ?
Regards,
Ratheesh BS

entry.title: Different overtime rate on public holiday for certain holiday religion and employee's religion
entry.content:
Hi Expert, 

How do i set up configuration for this scenario

- If public holiday is for muslim, then muslim employee will get overtime rate of 4x, while employee with other religions will only get 2x overtime rate and vice versa (The overtime rate depend on the public holiday's and employee's religious denomination)

Any advise is appreciated

Thank you,

Kelvin

entry.title: Re: Unable to get ABAP in eclipse
entry.content:
Hi 

Thanks for the reply.

I have attached the screenshot

entry.title: Re: SAP Companion Hotspot
entry.content:
Hi Natalie,

Yes there is. 

Create your content help bubble, assign it to a screen object and then open the Appearance tab for the bubble.  Turn on the Show Instantly field and then save the changes.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Cloud- Plan cost in WBSEs in ‘Display Financial Plan...
entry.content:
Hi Bob,

Thank you, I have now got the Project Cost Report values. For Financial Statement Version YPS2 I maintained 2 settings:

1. Assigning a semantic tag along with FS Item number in 'Assign Semantic tag to Financial Statement Version'.

2. Added GL accounts to YPS2 in 'Maintain Financial Statement Version'. Here I right-clicked on the main branch and chose 'Change' to make the FS item keys visible, then added the GLs under the same item number.

Reference: https://microlearning.opensap.com/media/Why+YPS2+Financial+Statement+Version+is+Important+in+SAP+S+4HANA+Cloud+-+SAP+S+4HANA+Cloud+Finance+and+Risk/1_gbllsali

entry.title: Re: runtime assignment of database connection gives error
entry.content: i have checked the connection values in debug mode also. there are no errors in connection. the same connection values and same query if run in vb code and assign the result to dataset and use that dataset in crystal report, its working. but the command mode is giveing error for same connection and same query

entry.title: How to import internal table from the file in the Eclipse ADT during debugging

Praveen

Praveen

entry.title: Retain Data Store in SAP CPI based on Retain Until Date
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a requirement for retaining the datastores data more than 90 days. Since, it is not possible as per the settings a custom Iflow is created to handle the same but it is polling all the data which is creating load on the system and might occupy more memory than required.

 

Can we add some step which can take the consideration of expiration date and extend the date based on that instead of all the data at one go. Please suggest if we can optimize this in a better way?

Thanks.

Best Regards,

Nidhi Srivastava

entry.title: Price Adjustment as per stock shortage
entry.content:
Hello All,

We have one scenario  - We have one material which was there in storage area for a year, as it was kept for a long time material qty was reduced, suppose Total Qty was-100 and total value-100, Now it is reduce to 90 qty.

Now they are selling material with shortage qty -90 to customer,  and receiving Material from customer at 120 (they are not following Subcontracting). they have 10 qty in stock because 90 qty was send to customer, 

@they will adjust remaining 10 qty by scraping the stock and by other way. but value 10 how can they adjust it.

entry.title: Re: March Developer Challenge - CloudEvents: Week 2
entry.content: @emiliocampo Thanks for sharing the to_binary representation, so others can see what the difference is when outputting to_structured and to_binary. Great example!

entry.title: Re: Report is loading message on SAP B1 web client
entry.content:
Dear Tushar

One possibility is that the reporting Service is failed because the Job Service is not binding to a valid 'Service Unit'.
Please try the below workaround :

1. Log into the database by SQL Server.
2. run the query:
SELECT [Id] From [SLDModel.SLDData].[dbo].[MailerServices]
3. Check the value of [MailerService_Id] in [SLDModel.SLDData].[dbo].[HostingUnits], if it has the same Id with the one you checked in step 2.

4. If no, this should be the reason why the crystal report failed in web client.

Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Create a commit in Git when an ABAP task is released
entry.content:
Hello Karin,

We are implementing gCTS using Bitbucket repository, Is there any sample code for Bitbucket repository for task based committing?

Or any pointers how can I achieve task based committing  for bitbucket ?

We are on S4HANA ON PREMISE 2022 Initial Shipment.

We are able to achieve the TR release-based commit for bitbucket. 

Regards,

Rajeev Goswami

entry.title: No Paging on Install Base Items
entry.content:
There is no paging on the Item tab in Install Base. Paging is set to 10 records but all 22 are showing. Pagination is expected here.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: No Paging on Install Base Items
entry.content:
The rows preset via Adaptation Mode are visible rows. If the number of items exceeds the visible rows, a scroll bar will show up. This is the system-designed behavior.

Pagination is not available for the table here. You may register the idea/requirement for this feature in Customer Influence for SAP Cloud For Customer at https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/903.

entry.title: Re: Salesforce OCI Integration with SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi Naresh,

As per the channel screenshot there is 2"//" just before availability, hence can you please verify the endpoint one more time. And in the relative URL u just need to give the URL post <host_name> starting from /* and hostname needs to be in the connection tab
I'm not sure if my understanding the requirement correctly here, so are you trying to post the data into the Salesforce or requesting for it?
Moreover, I will suggest trying the Post via postman to see the results if it works then there is some issue in the I-Flow other way you can also ask Salesforce team to share the postman collection where they are able to post the data.
We have don't the apex calls for posting the messages into SF and it works.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Service overview and Service Order Processing
entry.content: Thanks a lot for this process description. Just wondering about down payment. Where to include this in the flow?

entry.title: Re: SAP Stammtisch Wien 04.04.2024
entry.content:
Themenvorschlag:
proaktives Implementieren von SAP-Notes

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 - Year end BC JNL reversed in the wrong period
entry.content:
Hi,

May be on the COPY of the database, you can check by putting the journal entry with reverse value in Dec 2022.(i.e. whichever accounts were there in the original entry canceled, enter with opposite values in the debit and credit column). Then run the PEC again for year 2022. Once the entry for movement is recorded, cancel the same again in Jan 2023 so that the values of debits and credits are matched.

Once, this is done, check if the balances in accounts on Jan 2023 for the accounts are properly impacted.

Afterwards, you can create the JE with similar to original JE of dec 2022 and then do the PEC closing again.

You have to test and check the impact.

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Multiple billing document creation for zero quantity and Status completion is not feasible in VF04

entry.title: Re: Balance Sheet Reclassification and Regrouping in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Shakeel

Thank you for the detailed explanation on reclass in S/4. I read your other post on advanced FCV too. very insightful, thank you!.

Could you pls share some insights into how to achieve a 'GL balance' based reclassification for a bank GL, such that if the balance on the GL is negative then it should be reclassified to a Liabilities account..?

I explored the nodes in the Advanced Valuation function and do not find place for a simple rule for achieving this.

Looking forward to your response..

 

Thanks

Gayathri

entry.title: Material XXXX status obsolete does not allow the planning run
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have run the MRP LIVE for one of our plant, there are some materials who got failed for planning. Upon checking we found out that these materials are marked with obsolete status. I just wanted to ensured will there be any impact if these materials are not plan or there is any way we can exclude the obsolete materials from planning run. This is very urgent and any help will be appreciated.

Thanks,

Shubham

entry.title: Re: Shift timing error - Shift finish 02:00:00 is after s...
entry.content: Thanks Arjuna, understood the issue.I have to configure as per your suggestion or have to make B2 as my last shift.

entry.title: Re: SAP Convergent Charging - Upgrade from 5.0.6.X to 202X
entry.content:
Hello,

usually the version of each BRIM component should be the same (ex 2023 FPS1) . This is the best way to insure stability of the platform. 

Best regards,

Eric F.

entry.title: Creating multiple PM Malfunction Reports at once
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have a question regarding create PM Malfunction Report:

Is it possible to create multiple PM Malfunction Reports at the same time with the same data, but with different equipment? And, how would that work?

Thanks a lot for your help!

Nicole

entry.title: Re: Journal Entry Verification Workflow - Multi Level Flexible Workflow
entry.content: Hi Saleem, Could you please help me on the same to implement multi-level approvals.

entry.title: Custom Pre-Condition for Workflow Parked Invoice as Complete
entry.content:
I have a request to add a Cost Center option in the Workflow for Parked Invoice as Complete pre-condition, start condition section.

I have created a new pre-condition with the name BAdI: Cost Center with custom logic in SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_DEF.

but the option for BAdI: Cost Center does not yet exist and I read that it requires custom logic again with SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_EVAL

I want to display something like a pop-up window (search help) like that

so that users can immediately choose. Can it be done like that? Thank You

entry.title: Re: New SAP SuccessFactors App in the Microsoft Teams App Store and Deprecation of Legacy App Packag
entry.content: Thanks @VanessaLi for the clarification. We went out and explained to our managers that time off approvals they were seeing come through were a new feature and time off requests were coming later on, but then around a week ago they disappeared again! Do you know why? It’s really confusing our comms messages. Thanks

entry.title: Re: How can I access the parameters of objects?
entry.content:
Hello @raymond_giuseppi 



I'm looking for which objects the IDs here are linked to.Does SAP keep such a database?


For example ; This is how I can find out that the 'VL' ID is used on the VL33N screen. But when I operated with the 'VL' parameter in the program (SE38), I also saw that this was not true 🙂 I learned from experienced people that the parameter that should be used here on the VL33N screen is "VLM" (thanks sap community :)) and the program worked properly, but this was always the case. I may not be so lucky.
Therefore, is there a table showing the parameters connected to the screens? I'm looking for this.

  


thanks .

entry.title: Re: Creation of a simple Turnover Analysis with Stories in People Analytics
entry.content:
Hello, 
thanks for this - it has worked great in one of my reports. 
Just one question: is there a way to adapt this report so that I can select a certain time frame for the Turnover Rate calculation? For example if I need the report for March '23 (HC one year back) to Feb '24 (Headcount "Today") with all exits considered in this time frame.... 
Thanks, 
Jan

entry.title: Does SPL screen contact logic?
entry.content:
I couldn't find the information.

We have set the contact linked with the BP, does the screen logic same as customer/vendor?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Material XXXX status obsolete does not allow the plan...
entry.content:
Hello,

Can you set MRP Type as ND in MRP view tab ? I believe if this material set as ND it will not include in mrp run

entry.title: Re: Getting the error message while adding the data hub r...
entry.content:
Hello,

I had similar issue, and fixed it. You must compare your extensions name with the folders in /hybris/bin/modules. it must be matched. If you have any other zip files such as hybris suite integration package,  the missing folders might come from it.

entry.title: Security Updates on "3034848 - List of VAT payers in Poland: (...)"
entry.content:
Hi,

We followed the steps described on sapnote "3291289 - List of VAT Payers for SAP S/4HANA (OVS): Implementation overview" up to the point of deploying the application from github "https://github.com/SAP-samples/localization-toolkit-s4hana-cloud-bank-account-validation."  on our Cloud Foundry

Our Integration team then became concerned that there's no security/authorization features in the application, which would allow anyone with the url from our java application to access the API and make calls.

Should we expect to have such improvements pushed to the official github of this application or such features are something to be customized by ourselves?

entry.title: Re: What is the next product of SAP BusinessObjects Busin...
entry.content:
Hi Idanon,

Next version, SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025, planned for end of 2024, will be available both on premise and as private cloud, and will be supported until at least end of 2031.

Please refer to SAP Analytics Business Intelligence Statement of Direction which remains the reference for SAP BusinessObjects long term strategy and regularly updated.

To you second question, yes, Java APIs will remain available.

Best,

entry.title: Re: Can I extend a certain app? With Clean Core? How?
entry.content:
Hello @snavajan 

It's always ok to ask a question 😊. I mentioned yours very briefly under Part 3 and step 1:

 

@mlauber wrote:

If you need your own custom table, consider if using Custom Business Objects works for your case. If not, be sure to build the RAP object properly (Database table, Basic interface view, View entity, View projection, Behavior, Behavior projection). Remember that custom business objects can have automatic Change Document handling, as well as System Administrative Data (created at, by, changed at, by) handling out-of-the-box.

Once again, there is no "one answer". My personal opinion is that if your custom development is tightly coupled to your S/4HANA system, data or process, and there is no other strong reason for side-by-side (such as using intelligent services from BTP), then I would keep your custom development on-stack. So no, it's wrong to say that any custom development should be side-by-side. Also consider the below recommendation:

You see, for 1 option in the old model you now have several options. Pick the one that suits the development, its business context and business process the best. Remember that custom development should not make things more complex, but should fulfill business requirements to better support the business and end users. Remember you develop for them.

entry.title: Re: What is the next product of SAP BusinessObjects Busin...
entry.content: Thank you very much~~

entry.title: Post-quantum computing threats are game-changing
entry.content:
Are quantum computers a real threat to cryptography and information security? How safe your data and applications are against quantum computers? It takes many years for a conventional computer to crack an RSA 2048 prime number factor encryption, but a powerful quantum computer can crack it in a few hours. How can you protect your data and applications if this becomes a reality?

Join SAP Cybersecurity professional Sandip Dholakia and find out if quantum computers are a real threat to cryptography and how to prepare your data and applications for post-quantum cryptography. 

Speakers: Sandip Dholakia, Principal Security Architect, SAP

Join live and replay: https://youtube.com/live/GPcjJUgJLMg?feature=share

entry.title: Re: Link abapGit repository issue: "SSL handshake with github.com:443 failed"
entry.content: Thank you! It's working now.

entry.title: Bienvenido al SAP CLOUD ALM, session in spanish
entry.content:
SAP Cloud ALM, es una herramienta que está incluida en su suscripción a la nube y en SAP Enterprise Support, esta herramienta le ayuda a implementar y operar soluciones empresariales inteligentes en la nube e híbridas. En esta sesión, descubra cómo puede beneficiarse de una solución nativa en la nube lista para usar, diseñada como punto de entrada central para gestionar su entorno SAP con una implementación guiada basada en contenido y operaciones altamente automatizadas y que además permite una Grand automatización de tareas del día a día.

Speaker: Cesar Martins, Solution Manager, SAP

Link to join and replay: Bienvenido al SAP CLOUD ALM (youtube.com)

entry.title: Bem-vindo(a) ao SAP Cloud ALM, session in portuguese
entry.content:
SAP Cloud ALM, que está incluído em sua assinatura na nuvem e no SAP Enterprise Support, ajuda você a implementar e operar soluções empresariais híbridas e inteligentes na nuvem. Nesta sessão, você irá aprender como se beneficiar de uma solução em nuvem nativa e pronta para uso, projetada como ponto de entrada central para gerenciar sua estrutura SAP com uma implementação guiada por conteúdo próprio, e uma operação altamente automatizada.

Speaker: Cesar Martins, Solution Manager, SAP

Link to join and replay: Bem-vindo(a) ao SAP Cloud ALM (youtube.com)

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM - Transports for SAP on-premise Landscape
entry.content:
Hi,

I am looking to understand if SAP Cloud ALM provides capabilities for transport management on-premise. I saw there was some information online about the upcoming features for SAP Cloud ALM to not only manage cloud transportation but also on-premise transports.
Could you please help me clarify if regular SAP ABAP on-premise transports are support, if not, whether this functionality will be enabled in the near future?

Thank you


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM - Transports for SAP on-premise Landscape
entry.content: SAP Cloud ALM does support on-premise systems for transport request deployment in the landscape. The SAP Help Portal SAP Cloud ALM documentation contains all relevant prerequisite, setup, and usage information in the Enabling Transport Management - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and On-Premise Systems page.

entry.title: SU01 account type
entry.content:
Dear Expert:

About su01 field "User Type", I confuse how to use.

For my current issue , other SAP system use (ALE and RFC) to communication . If I set User Type:Communication  , it will face "Password logon not possible (Initial password expired) ".

I can set User Type: System , it work. For my current system use, just ALE & RFC. We wish No need change password , password nerver expired. Which User Type useful for my need ?

~~
Jeff


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SU01 account type
entry.content:
Dear Jeff,

 

please refer to the documentation of user types. You can find it idrectly in SU01 (use the 'F1'-function on the user type field) or at many places at help.sap.com.

For instance for s/4 Hana 2021:

https://help.sap.com/docs/ABAP_PLATFORM_NEW/ad77b44570314f6d8c3a8a807273084c/4b04325ec2ad2b5ce10000000a42189c.html?locale=en-US

 

b.rgds, 
Bernhard

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I'm Vittorio and I fall in People looking to switch their careers mid-life. I'm 32 and I lost my job few month ago and I'm struggling to find a new position. I became daddy less one year ago and for this reason I want to improve my skills and catch a new job for a better future for my son.

Sincerely

Vittorio.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hi @kduong113 - it's great to have you here in SAP Community! I would highly recommend that you join the Beginner's Corner. You will get great advice there from @David_Chaviano and others. I would also like to direct you to this blog post from David.

Best of luck with your studies!

entry.title: Re: screenshots android disabled in the app
entry.content: I would also want to add to this, we could not record a demo of our product on a phone unless it is used on an iOS device.  We had to show the app takes pictures and uses the barcode scanner, so to demo on a laptop was not feasible, even casting your Android device to a computer did not work because of the security enabled. There is now security benefit if you are able to take screenshots on iOS but not on Android. This could rather be a feature that developers can enable should they have the need for it in their application.

entry.title: Re: Impact of enabling Story Reporting on legacy reporting
entry.content: Thank you so much. That helps with some clarity!

entry.title: new hire improvement - direct loading of new hire tasks-instead of reloading and logging out and in
entry.content:
Hello, currently with ONB 2.0 if the new hire completes the onboarding tasks (provide personal data, additional data step and e-sign documents) then he always has to reload the page or log out and log in again to unlock the next task.

Will this be improved with the 1H 2024 Product Release, meaning that the next task can be activated and processed directly after completing the previous task (without reloading the page)?

SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding
